text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Did you enjoy the race, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It looked like everyone in the stands was having
fun too!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Their sparkling eyes and cheering voices mean
more than anything to me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
After all, I was only able to win today because of
their support!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You know what? I want to do something for them
as thanks!
choice_data_list:
You've already gifted them with a fantastic
victory!

You've already gifted them with a fantastic
victory!
They're expecting great races from you yet.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You know what? I want to do something for them
as thanks!
choice_data_list:
You've already gifted them with a fantastic
victory!

You've already gifted them with a fantastic
victory!
They're expecting great races from you yet.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You flatter me. ♪ You say that as if that's
the greatest gift of all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But thank you! That means a lot to me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It's time to make our triumphant return together!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The track is my stage, and I still have so many
more races to perform on it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Each time I step up on that stage, I'll give
everyone the time of their lives—and that's a
promise.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm counting on you to keep up the tough love
during training!
